## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` when Electron lifecycle, permissions, camera, onboarding, or navigation changed

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] No camera frames, landmark sequences, private exports, credentials, or signing material are committed.
- [ ] Product copy avoids medical diagnosis, treatment, or prevention claims.
